text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm working in my office as usual when...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'll leave the documents here, okay?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That's that. Now I just need to check my
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did something fall down?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! This is...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hot springs! Trainer, let's go to the hot springs!
We won that hot spring vacation ticket,
remember?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We should take this chance while we have it! You
pick a date, and I'll fit it into my schedule!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Ines Fujin and I decide to take a trip to
the hot springs.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for visiting our
establishment today.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Dinner will be served from six in the evening, so
please enjoy your stay until then.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I was just practicing my customer service. I
can't even remember how many times I've worked
part-time shifts at an inn.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, Trainer, your room is super
huuuge! And the view from your window is
beautiful! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm kinda jealous... Hey, change rooms with me!
choice_data_list: The view can't be that different.
The view can't be that different.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you just don't get it! Even a slight difference
in angle can completely change things.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Do you want some tea, by the way? I've got
nothing to do, so I can give you a massage or
something if you want.
choice_data_list: Let's just enjoy the moment and relax.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. Then it's time for me to kick
back!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Say, Trainer. What time is it?
choice_data_list: It hasn't even been an hour yet.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What?! Seriously?! It feels we've been here for
like three hours already!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Has time slowed down or something? Is this
what staying at an inn is always like?
choice_data_list: You're just used to being much busier.
You're just used to being much busier.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's true. I'd normally be standing behind a
register or running along a racetrack right about
now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If I were still living at home, I'd probably be out
shopping for dinner. Or maybe helping my little
sisters with their homework?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But it's just us right now—no customers or sisters.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's so quiet... All you can hear is the gentle hum
of the breeze and the sound of footsteps on the
tatami mats.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...I might go take a dip in the hot springs. Do you
want to come along, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That felt sooo good! ♪ It wasn't crowded
either, so I got the chance to really stretch my
legs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha... There's seriously nothing to do until
dinner time, huh.
choice_data_list: Why don't you take a nap?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: A nap? That feels like a waste, though...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We might never get an opportunity like this
again. It's like the calm before the storm.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Say, Trainer. Seeing as we've both got time on
our hands, let's go for a stroll.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, it's nice and cool. Perfect for when you've just
gotten out of a hot bath.
choice_data_list: Was it too hot in the room?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it was fine. I've just got warm fuzzies left
over from the bath, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew... The time usually flies by, but today has
gone really slowly.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Once we go home, it'll be back to the hustle and
bustle of everyday life...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But you know what...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I guess a busy life just suits my daily rhythm
better, somehow.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So I think I'm looking forward to getting back to
the academy and those hectic days packed with
races, work, and training.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I've actually got a teensy request. Would you do
it for me?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Don't get all suspicious about it! Just say "yes"
already!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Geez, sometimes I don't know what to do with
you. Let me rephrase it, then.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Will you continue to support me as my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Great to hear! ♪ I'm excited for what the
future will bring! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...I hope the days we spend together never come to an
end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Ines Fujin and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
